Subject: August Global Employee Town Hall (8:00-9:00 a.m. CT)
Required Attendees: DL Global Weatherford Announcements
Description:

This will be hosted via Teams Live Events on 27 August from 8:00-9:00 a.m. CT (Houston). The calendar invitation should save in your local time zone. Click here to join the town hall <https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/ap/t-59584e83/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fteams.microsoft.com%2Fl%2Fmeetup-join%2F19%253ameeting_NWRhOGEzZTAtNTA0MS00MTVlLTllOTctODY1YTI4OTY5MTVh%2540thread.v2%2F0%3Fcontext%3D%257B%2522Tid%2522%253A%2522dd63fb60-07f6-4d96-8d40-ebeca61a524e%2522%252C%2522Oid%2522%253A%2522d7703e82-78e6-45db-a982-49ce2508b8b0%2522%252C%2522IsBroadcastMeeting%2522%253Atrue%252C%2522role%2522%253A%2522a%2522%257D%26btype%3Da%26role%3Da&data=05%7C02%7Cprashanth.rajagopalan%40Weatherford.com%7C0626c09fb0ef4fd2753008dddff41f09%7Cdd63fb6007f64d968d40ebeca61a524e%7C0%7C0%7C638912962230781364%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=HbzODQfSQUn504WInLPlXk3%2F5DgPGDko1cTMF3X59Q4%3D&reserved=0> . Thank you,

Lilibeth

Description:
-----Original Appointment-----
From: Giles, Lilibeth <lilibeth.giles1@Weatherford.com> 
Sent: Wednesday, September 17, 2025 1:26 PM
To: Giles, Lilibeth; Figueroa, Francisco; Parley, Jordan; Kelly, Timothy J; Oliveira, Willian Webber de; Soni, Somesh; Sanderson, Michael M.; Taverner, Domino
Cc: Rambosek, Christopher; Forrest, Jeffrey G; Snyder, Mark; Padron, Freddy
Subject: NCR Reduction initiative - MTG#4
When: Thursday, October 16, 2025 2:00 PM-3:00 PM (UTC-06:00) Central Time (US & Canada).
Where: Microsoft Teams Meeting

 

9/17- No updates on deliverables (MTG #3) – data will be presented in the next MTG schedule(10/16/25) 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Open actions: 

*	Key Discussion Points & Action Items
	1. WHRD and Wallingford Data Mining / Pareto Analysis
	• Task: Generate Pareto charts of PCBA defects using 3-month and 6-month data for comparison.
	• Responsible: Jordan / Frank ( Please give engineering a heads-up on the results of the data mining before the meeting schedule)
	2. Inventory Management Initiative
	• Task: Develop and implement an approach to manage the flow of PCBA orders between procurement and the Supplier, to prevent warranty lapses
	• Responsible: Willian ( Note: I was not 100% sure on this one; this is just how I understood it.  Please modify as you see fit) @Oliveira, Willian Webber de <mailto:Willian.Oliveira@weatherford.com> 
	3. DS R&D Engineering Scope Expansion
	• Task: Review and plan expansion of FT/ambient testing at the Supplier once Pareto defects data is available and reviewed.
	• Responsible: Mike
	4. Flow Engineering Requirements
	• Task: Determine requirements for FT/ambient testing at the Supplier once Pareto defects data is available and reviewed.
	• Responsible: Somesh
	
	Additional Notes
	• WHRD / DS R&D Engineering: Currently working on IBM3 boards for Supplier FT/ambient testing (Supplier: Mil Spec).
	• Cost Impact: Potential impact on cost noted as part of this improvement initiative.
	• Bottleneck Identified: WFT’s PCBA testing cycle was flagged as a bottleneck.
*	PCBA from the CMs is not tested until issued to a WO. If the PCBA fails outside of warranty, the CM is not obligated to provide credits.
	- West Hardy: PCBA tested before installation into the tool assembly.
	-  Wallingford: PCBA tested as part of the full tool assembly test.

Subject: Women of Weatherford (WOW) Guest Speaker – Melissa Folz
Required Attendees: DL Global Weatherford Announcements
Description:
Join us as Melissa Folz, P.E., Managing Director of Non-Operated Assets at Chord Energy, shares actionable steps for purposeful leadership and career growth in the energy industry.

About the Speaker: 
Melissa Folz, P.E., is Managing Director of Non-Operated Assets at Chord Energy, overseeing operations across the Bakken and Marcellus. With nearly two decades of experience, she has led major corporate integrations, including Oasis and Whiting in 2022 and Enerplus in 2024, and held leadership roles spanning production, reservoir, and subsurface assessment. A licensed Professional Engineer and LSU graduate, she has served on the board of Permex Petroleum and built a strong record of operational and organizational leadership.

Event Details: 

*	Date: 6 November 2025
*	Time: 8:00 to 9:00 a.m. CT

Hello everyone,

This will be a working meeting focused on reviewing and discussing identified NCRs, organized by part number and type of defect.

Feel free to forward this invite to anyone who should be included in the discussion. 

 

Thank you,

Lilibeth

Subject: PCBA Update to bring additional Engineering Support up to Speed (Izhar Ahmad)
Required Attendees: Bowden, Roy W;Hickman, Benjamin M;Kelly, Timothy J;Parley, Jordan;Arevalo, Dante;Giles, Lilibeth;Ahmad, Izhar;Shugen, Li;Rajagopalan, Prashanth;Oliveira, Willian Webber de;Robinson, Valarie;Koch, Sven
Meeting Resources: 16178 W Hardy Rd RSS Conference Room
Description:
Jordan/Tim,

Please take the lead with your team to give an overview to Izhar that is now at WHR that will be a resource for PCBA from this background at Baker.

Lets meet in the main conference room and go over the top issues that can bring him up to speed.

 

 

Thanks…..Roy 

 

 

 

 

Hi team,

 

Following up on this meeting we had the week before last.

 

I mentioned that we have a new Principal Engineer in our team with extensive PCB manufacturing experience from Baker – Izhar Ahmad.

 

I’ve asked Izhar to get involved to help inform our approach going forward.

 

I think a good first step will be for Izhar to do a deep dive and get a detailed end-to-end view of our current process.

 

@Bowden, Roy W <mailto:Roy.Bowden@Weatherford.com>  can you please ask your team to support Izhar and share and/all information with him so he can get up to speed?  I think as a starting point, he needs to spend some time with Walter, Ben, Jordan, Dante, and Lilibeth.  He should also visit Milspec and meet the key people there, and ideally also visit with Canyon and Innova.

 

I’ll be in Houston from the end of next week, so I’d like to plan the supplier visits for the week of 30th so I can go with him.

 

Thanks,

Ruben

 

Ruben Martinez

These office hours are designed to give those questions the time and attention they deserve.

*	HR Leader Joining: Silvia Costa and Gabriela Moreno

What It Is
HR: Ask Me Anything Office Hours is your opportunity to connect directly with HR leaders on topics that shape your career and work experience, including career development, benefits and compensation, growth and mobility opportunities, learning programs, and other HR topics.

 

What It’s Not
Individualized questions will not be addressed during the session. For personal matters, please connect with your HR Business Partner. This forum is designed to focus on common questions and themes so we can provide clear answers, share helpful resources, and highlight opportunities available to employees.

Subject: International Women’s Day Panel Discussion
Required Attendees: DL Global Weatherford Announcements
Description:
The Women of Weatherford (WOW) are proud to host an International Women’s Day panel discussion. International Women’s Day (IWD) is a global opportunity to recognize the achievements of women and reinforce our commitment to creating a workplace where everyone feels empowered to perform at their best. While IWD was recognized on March 8, we want to keep the conversation going throughout the month and encourage everyone to join us for this discussion! 

 

The panel will explore this year’s theme, “Give to Gain,” highlighting evolving leadership approaches, new perspectives on mentoring and development, and how leaders are empowering others while strengthening collaboration across the organization. Our panelists, Claudia Amorocho, Nina Haland, Kathy Bradley, and Carla Vizzini, with moderator Debra Martinez, will share their perspectives. Attendees will also have the opportunity to submit questions during the session for our panelists to address.

 

Event Details
If you are located at the Saint James Place (SJP) office, please join us in person in the Marcellus Conference Room. 

*	Date: Wednesday, 25 March 2026
*	Time: 7:30 to 8:30 a.m. CT
*	Location: SJP Marcellus Conference Room and Teams Meeting
*	Join Meeting Here <https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/ap/t-59584e83/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fteams.microsoft.com%2Fl%2Fmeetup-join%2F19%253ameeting_MzAyMmEwYmYtMDVjZS00OTU0LTg2NWUtMTE2YTY2ZmNkOWZm%2540thread.v2%2F0%3Fcontext%3D%257b%2522Tid%2522%253a%2522dd63fb60-07f6-4d96-8d40-ebeca61a524e%2522%252c%2522Oid%2522%253a%2522d7703e82-78e6-45db-a982-49ce2508b8b0%2522%257d&data=05%7C02%7Cprashanth.rajagopalan%40Weatherford.com%7C014d76f967a0481a988108de83956398%7Cdd63fb6007f64d968d40ebeca61a524e%7C0%7C0%7C639092875401794179%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=j1lS3etvAMO3oAHSq8Rrr7L2mgBL8w00XqzDAZpkcvA%3D&reserved=0>

Description:
Please join us for HR: Ask Me Anything Office Hours with Kristin Ruzicka and the HR Leadership Team. This session is an opportunity to ask questions and discuss topics that matter most to you. We often receive many questions during our global town halls, but cannot always address them all in real time. These office hours are designed to give those questions the time and attention they deserve.

 

Event Details: 

Session 1: Join Meeting Here <https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/ap/t-59584e83/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fteams.microsoft.com%2Fl%2Fmeetup-join%2F19%253ameeting_ZDU4ZDA4M2MtZDZkYi00OTVkLWEwNDMtNmQxMGM4YWEwNTIz%2540thread.v2%2F0%3Fcontext%3D%257b%2522Tid%2522%253a%2522dd63fb60-07f6-4d96-8d40-ebeca61a524e%2522%252c%2522Oid%2522%253a%2522aab126b6-8481-4f8a-b95c-0d957b483aea%2522%257d&data=05%7C02%7Cprashanth.rajagopalan%40Weatherford.com%7Ca813e1150aab44c08c6908de851bf215%7Cdd63fb6007f64d968d40ebeca61a524e%7C0%7C0%7C639094552627510128%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=0lN8kmR3rAg3E6l1ZWL4GWZWyLIlMAma%2BHK%2BEyWnrg0%3D&reserved=0> 

*	HR Leader Joining: Fathi Ghodbane and Emma Millar

 

What It Is
HR: Ask Me Anything Office Hours is your opportunity to connect directly with HR leaders on topics that shape your career and work experience, including career development, benefits and compensation, growth and mobility opportunities, learning programs, and other HR topics.

 

What It’s Not
Individualized questions will not be addressed during the session. For personal matters, please connect with your HR Business Partner. This forum is designed to focus on common questions and themes so we can provide clear answers, share helpful resources, and highlight opportunities available to employees.

 

Submit a Question:
Please submit your questions <https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.office.com%2FPages%2FResponsePage.aspx%3Fid%3DYPtj3fYHlk2NQOvsphpSToI-cNfmeNtFqYJJziUIuLBUOTZHSTAzMFZIQjM5OVdOVDc4UkNSTFBSUy4u&data=05%7C02%7Cprashanth.rajagopalan%40Weatherford.com%7Ca813e1150aab44c08c6908de851bf215%7Cdd63fb6007f64d968d40ebeca61a524e%7C0%7C0%7C639094552627540607%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=zwImGUIHGDT7o%2BuUtATQKgqvrZtYK%2BSx9VyrlxfBpB8%3D&reserved=0>  by 19 March and keep them concise so they can be easily addressed during the live Q&A.

 

This is your opportunity to be heard and get the answers that matter most. We look forward to seeing you at our HR: Ask Me Anything Office Hours!

Description:
Please join us for HR: Ask Me Anything Office Hours with Kristin Ruzicka and the HR Leadership Team. This session is an opportunity to ask questions and discuss topics that matter most to you. We often receive many questions during our global town halls, but cannot always address them all in real time. These office hours are designed to give those questions the time and attention they deserve.

 

Event Details: 

Session 3: Join Meeting Here <https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/ap/t-59584e83/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fteams.microsoft.com%2Fl%2Fmeetup-join%2F19%253ameeting_ZDJlMWIwZjItMWJkZi00ZmE3LWE2ZjktODkzMGM2NWExOTg4%2540thread.v2%2F0%3Fcontext%3D%257b%2522Tid%2522%253a%2522dd63fb60-07f6-4d96-8d40-ebeca61a524e%2522%252c%2522Oid%2522%253a%2522aab126b6-8481-4f8a-b95c-0d957b483aea%2522%257d&data=05%7C02%7Cprashanth.rajagopalan%40Weatherford.com%7Cb8db365b3eac486ae0e708de851bfeab%7Cdd63fb6007f64d968d40ebeca61a524e%7C0%7C0%7C639094552714950116%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=Sq%2BZdH8%2F4S%2BpsyY9Dm2x4R2SdTtNBmJ%2BAs1wbBxpIxU%3D&reserved=0> 

*	HR Leader Joining: Nathan Rowden

 

What It Is
HR: Ask Me Anything Office Hours is your opportunity to connect directly with HR leaders on topics that shape your career and work experience, including career development, benefits and compensation, growth and mobility opportunities, learning programs, and other HR topics.

 

What It’s Not
Individualized questions will not be addressed during the session. For personal matters, please connect with your HR Business Partner. This forum is designed to focus on common questions and themes so we can provide clear answers, share helpful resources, and highlight opportunities available to employees.

 

Submit a Question:
Please submit your questions <https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.office.com%2FPages%2FResponsePage.aspx%3Fid%3DYPtj3fYHlk2NQOvsphpSToI-cNfmeNtFqYJJziUIuLBUOTZHSTAzMFZIQjM5OVdOVDc4UkNSTFBSUy4u&data=05%7C02%7Cprashanth.rajagopalan%40Weatherford.com%7Cb8db365b3eac486ae0e708de851bfeab%7Cdd63fb6007f64d968d40ebeca61a524e%7C0%7C0%7C639094552714980397%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=nh7HZxUfXh6S0if0HjFjIIyPjTeP102%2Bi2PzTZDMHvU%3D&reserved=0>  by 19 March and keep them concise so they can be easily addressed during the live Q&A.

 

This is your opportunity to be heard and get the answers that matter most. We look forward to seeing you at our HR: Ask Me Anything Office Hours!

Follow-up Sessions: Dependents & Emergency Contacts in Oracle HCM

 

 

 

 

Dear MENA Employees ,

Further to our previous announcement regarding the introduction of the Dependents and Emergency Contacts data fields in Oracle HCM, we are pleased to provide an opportunity for employees to ask questions and receive a system walkthrough on how to manage this information directly in the system.

To support this, we will be conducting live demo sessions to guide employees on how to:

*	Add or update Dependents information
*	Add or update Emergency Contacts information

These sessions will include a step-by-step walkthrough of the system and time for questions to address common queries.

Demo Session Details

You are encouraged to attend any one of the following sessions to familiarize with the new functionality:

*	Monday, 20 April 2026 | 3:00 PM (Dubai Time)
*	Wednesday, 22 April 2026 | 3:00 PM (Dubai Time)

Further session details and meeting links will be shared separately.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Need Help?

If you have any questions, please reach out to HR Helpdesk at HRHelpdesk@weatherford.com <mailto:HRHelpdesk@weatherford.com> . Thank you for your prompt attention and cooperation.

Follow-up Sessions: Dependents & Emergency Contacts in Oracle HCM

 

 

 

 

Dear MENA Employees ,

Further to our previous announcement regarding the introduction of the Dependents and Emergency Contacts data fields in Oracle HCM, we are pleased to provide an opportunity for employees to ask questions and receive a system walkthrough on how to manage this information directly in the system.

To support this, we will be conducting live demo sessions to guide employees on how to:

*	Add or update Dependents information
*	Add or update Emergency Contacts information

These sessions will include a step-by-step walkthrough of the system and time for questions to address common queries.

Demo Session Details

You are encouraged to attend any one of the following sessions to familiarize with the new functionality:

*	Monday, 20 April 2026 | 3:00 PM (Dubai Time)
*	Wednesday, 22 April 2026 | 3:00 PM (Dubai Time)

Further session details and meeting links will be shared separately.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Need Help?

If you have any questions, please reach out to HR Helpdesk at HRHelpdesk@weatherford.com <mailto:HRHelpdesk@weatherford.com> . Thank you for your prompt attention and cooperation.

Tim Kelly
